arts.sum: Fifth-place Arsenal travel to the London Stadium to face West Ham who lie 14th in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News: RB Leipzig push Benjamin Sesko to the Gunners - but there's a problem
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko signed a new RB Leipzig contract in the summer to continue his development in a familiar environment. After his extension, Sesko explained that he decided to stay and continue his development in the Bundesliga for at least another season, but this decision is looking increasingly questionable.

arts.ttl: 'Funny' - Neville responds to what he heard Carragher say about West Ham this week
arts.sum: Gary Neville has laughed about comments that Jamie Carragher made before West Ham beat Newcastle on Monday. The Hammers beat the Magpies 2-0 on 25... The post 'Funny' - Neville responds to what he heard Carragher say about West Ham this week appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: West Ham v Arsenal team news: Gabriel starts
arts.sum: West Ham are unchanged as Arsenal make two alterations from midweek The post West Ham v Arsenal team news: Gabriel starts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as key star returns for the Gunners
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as West Ham host Arsenal at the London Stadium in the Saturday evening Premier League kick-off.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hit with double injury blow ahead of West Ham as Partey misses out
arts.sum: Arsenal are without both Thomas Partey and Mikel Merino for their trip to West Ham United in the Premier League. Arteta did suggest some could miss the game as some unnamed players could not take part in Thursday's training session.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui names unchanged team to face Arsenal
arts.sum: West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson, Soler, Souček, Paquetá, Summerville, Bowen ©, Antonio Alongside Álvarez and Mayers on the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, defenders Vladimír Coufal and Ollie Scarles, midfielders Guido Rodríguez, Andy Irving, Luis Guilherme and forward Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder says he’d score more than 20 goals a season if Mikel Arteta played him up front
arts.sum: Arsenal have a bit of a striking problem at the moment. Indeed, Arsenal need a new striker in the eyes of many, and the Gunners...

arts.ttl: Team News: Jorginho and Trossard start
arts.sum: Arsenal: Raya, Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori, Jorginho, Rice, Odegaard, Saka, Trossard, Havertz. From the starting XI that beat Sporting 5-1 in Lisbon on Tuesday, in come Jorginho and Leandro Trossard, with Thomas Partey and Gabriel Martinelli missing out.

arts.ttl: West Ham United v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 5.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | And feel free to drop Emillia an email Elsewhere in the Premier League today Wolves 2-4 Bournemouth Crystal Palace 1-1 Newcastle Nottingham Forest 1-0 Ipswich Town Brentford 4-1 Leicester City Continue reading...
